steps.title: Read the angle relationships from the figure
steps.content: From the figure, angles $x$ and $y$ appear as vertical angles at the intersection of the transversal and line $m$, so $x = y$. Angles $x$ and $z$ are positioned as same-side interior (co-interior) angles formed by the transversal cutting the parallel lines $m$ and $n$, so $x + z = 180^\circ$.

steps.title: Solve for k using x = y
